---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  id: pub-listing
  contents: publications.yml
  type: default
  sort: false
  template: files/ejs/publication.ejs
---

My research spans psychometrics, organizational behavior, and quantitative methodology, with a focus on Latin American populations.

For a complete and up-to-date list, see my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iWvXzDYAAAAJ).

## Journal Articles & Book Chapters

:::{#pub-listing}
:::
